hero.title: Stop Doing It All.
hero.subtitle: Agents and Founders is a private community for entrepreneurs leveraging AI to scale their business.

whatIsThis.heading: What is this?
whatIsThis.description: We're {{founders}} acting as agents of change. We build {{agents}} (AI-powered workflows) to grow our companies. This is where we share the playbook.

bootstrappers.title: For Bootstrappers
bootstrappers.description: Build lean, automate smart, and scale without burning capital.

agencyOwners.title: For Agency Owners
agencyOwners.description: Deliver more value with AI workflows that wow clients and save time.

productFounders.title: For Product Founders
productFounders.description: Ship faster by automating ops, marketing, and customer success.

community.title: Community
community.description: A private Whatsapp group with vetted founders sharing wins, fails, and everything in between.

playbooks.title: Playbooks
playbooks.description: A private database of real-world AI workflows for marketing, sales, and ops that actually work.

masterminds.title: Masterminds
masterminds.description: Monthly deep-dives where members share their winning (and losing) experiments.

meetYourGuide.heading: Meet Agent K
meetYourGuide.description: Agent K is the community's friendly AI strategist. He curates the best tools and tactics so you don't have to. Think of him as the community guide through the chaos of building a business with AI automation—always one step ahead.

finalCta.heading: Ready to automate your growth?
finalCta.subtitle: Join 80+ founders who are already building the future with AI.

hero.title: Roundtables
hero.subtitle: Join intimate discussions with fellow founders to tackle real challenges, share insights, and accelerate your AI automation journey.

whatAreRoundtables.heading: What are Roundtables?
whatAreRoundtables.description1: Roundtables are sessions where groups of 4-6 founders come together to discuss specific challenges, share what's working, and provide actionable feedback to each other.
whatAreRoundtables.description2: Unlike traditional networking, these are focused working sessions designed to help you solve real problems and implement AI solutions faster.

sessionDuration.title: 90-Minute Sessions
sessionDuration.description: Focused time to dive deep into specific topics

intelligentNetworking.title: Intelligent Networking
intelligentNetworking.description: Master the art of building meaningful connections using AI-powered strategies

altata.name: Altata Café
altata.description: A sophisticated café in a hotel with an intimate vibe, perfect for deep conversations in Mexico City

siroco.name: Siroco Pizza
siroco.description: A delicious pizzeria owned by one of our members - the perfect place to share ideas and come together

aiTools.title: Building a business while keeping up with AI
aiTools.description: What tools have the most impact? How do choose which new tools to adopt?

customerEngine.title: Your AI-Powered Customer Engine
customerEngine.description: What does your customer acquisition funnel actually look like, and which parts are ripe for AI-powered automation?

cta.heading: Join the Next Roundtable
cta.subtitle: Members get access to all roundtables. Apply now to join the community.

hero.title: Masterminds
hero.subtitle: Monthly deep-dive sessions where members share their winning (and losing) experiments with AI automation.

whatAreMasterminds.heading: What are Masterminds?
whatAreMasterminds.description1: Masterminds are monthly gatherings where members present case studies of their AI automation projects. These aren't polished talks—they're raw, honest breakdowns of what worked, what didn't, and what they learned along the way.
whatAreMasterminds.description2: Each session features 2-3 member presentations followed by group discussion, Q&A, and collaborative problem-solving.

realExperiments.title: Real Experiments
realExperiments.description: Learn from actual implementations, not theory

resultsMetrics.title: Results & Metrics
resultsMetrics.description: See the actual ROI and impact of AI workflows

communityLearning.title: Community Learning
communityLearning.description: Collective wisdom from diverse founder experiences

implementation.title: Implementation Strategies
implementation.description: Step-by-step breakdowns of how members built and deployed their AI workflows

roi.title: ROI & Business Impact
roi.description: Real numbers on time saved, revenue generated, and costs reduced

failures.title: Lessons from Failures
failures.description: Honest discussions about what didn't work and why, so you can avoid the same mistakes

tools.title: Tool Recommendations
tools.description: Vetted recommendations for AI platforms, automation tools, and integrations

cta.heading: Join the Next Mastermind
cta.subtitle: Get exclusive access to member case studies and collective founder wisdom.

hero.title: Real Playbooks.
hero.subtitle: Step-by-step workflows from founders who've automated their way to growth. Full playbooks are available to community members only.

comingSoon.heading: Playbooks are brewing...
comingSoon.description: We're curating incredible workflows and step-by-step guides from founders who've automated their way to growth. Check back soon for real playbooks with real results!

clientOnboarding.title: How Sarah automated her entire client onboarding
clientOnboarding.author: Sarah Chen
clientOnboarding.summary: From lead to signed contract in 24 hours—completely automated. Learn the 5-tool stack that handles proposals, contracts, and kick-off meetings.

contentOutput.title: The 3-tool stack that tripled content output
contentOutput.author: Marcus Rivera
contentOutput.summary: From 2 blog posts a week to 6—without hiring a single writer. Discover the AI content pipeline that maintains quality at scale.
contentOutput.metrics: 300% increase in content, same team size

leadGen.title: Automating Sales: A founder's lead-gen agent
leadGen.author: Jessica Park
leadGen.summary: Built an AI agent that finds, qualifies, and reaches out to 100+ prospects daily. The complete blueprint from setup to first sale.

customerSupport.title: Zero-code customer support automation
customerSupport.author: Alex Thompson
customerSupport.summary: Handle 80% of customer inquiries automatically with a simple chatbot setup. No developers needed, works with your existing tools.

emailSequences.title: Email sequences that write themselves
emailSequences.author: David Kumar
emailSequences.summary: Personalized email campaigns generated by AI, optimized in real-time. See the exact prompts and workflows that 3x'ed open rates.

competitiveIntelligence.title: AI-powered competitive intelligence
competitiveIntelligence.author: Emily Watson
competitiveIntelligence.summary: Track competitors, analyze trends, and get weekly insights—all automated. The monitoring system that keeps you ahead of the market.

hero.title: Intelligent Networking
hero.subtitle: Master the art of building meaningful connections using AI-powered strategies

sessionOverview.heading: Session Overview
sessionOverview.description: In this roundtable session, we'll explore how to leverage AI tools and strategies to build more meaningful professional connections. We'll discuss practical approaches to networking that go beyond traditional methods, like:

topics.research: Using AI to research and personalize outreach
topics.relationships: Building systems to nurture long-term relationships
topics.tools: Tools and workflows that actually work

sessionPlaybook.heading: Session Playbook
sessionPlaybook.description: A comprehensive guide with tools, templates, and actionable strategies from our intelligent networking sessions.

joinSession.heading: Join the Session
joinSession.description: Reserve your spot for this roundtable session

liveQA.heading: Join the Conversation
liveQA.cardTitle: Live Q&A and Polls via Slido
liveQA.description: Join our interactive session to ask questions, participate in polls, and engage with other founders in real-time.

community.heading: Connect with the Community
community.description: Stay connected with fellow founders, share insights, and continue the conversation beyond the roundtable sessions.
